title: To Mistress Mary Willand.
content:
One more by thee, love, and desert have sent,
    T' enspangle this expansive firmament.
    O flame of beauty! come, appear, appear
    A virgin taper, ever shining here.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "To Mistress Mary Willand.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
